name: /operator-extension-init rejects an unknown file-name within a known source-namespace
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-extension-init.sh" google no-such-file --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_source_file' err.txt && grep -q 'no-such-file' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
